revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''3-1-140

The difference in level, expressed in decibels, of the emission or response on the principal axis of a sound source or receiver and the emission or response in a specified direction.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Angular deviation loss}}
